competitors.aiSummary: Aave App streamlines DeFi with features like effortless onboarding, simulation tools, and goal-oriented design, hiding complex crypto jargon.

tweets.fullText:
Bringing millions of users onchain requires consumer-friendly applications.

Read more on how Aave App reimagines the DeFi experience: https://t.co/be6qo3iGwy
Onboarding to the app is effortless and familiar. It supports deposits from over 12,000 banks, and you only need an email or phone number and a password to log in. https://t.co/2KKIEdaVnE

There's also a powerful simulation feature that allows users to project their earnings over time, turning a simple savings account into a goal-oriented financial planning tool. https://t.co/kQ7o9f4N35

Similarly, Aave App's design focuses entirely on the user's goals, such as saving money and earning yield.

There are no mentions of gas fees, network confirmations, or other crypto-specific jargon. https://t.co/ilBPkTMFHN

The best fintech apps solve a real problem for their users, and they do it in a way that is incredibly simple and intuitive.

Notably, these apps don't expose users to the complex underlying financial plumbing. https://t.co/O72swtihG3

competitors.aiSummary: Fluid highlights its DeFi architecture, boasting $4B market size, $200B trading volume, and 0% bad debt, with features like 0.1% liquidation penalties and up to 95% LTV borrowing.

tweets.fullText:
Borrow more. Lose less to liquidation.
Lend where capital works harder.

That's not a feature.

That's the architecture.

Stay Fluid. 🌊
https://t.co/Etf7gum96C

Fluid:

$4B in total market size.
$200B in cumulative trading volume.
$0 bad debt. Ever.
8 years building. 2 years live. Zero losses.

The highest capital efficiency in DeFi.

Now about Lenders:

Lenders don't just sit in a pool waiting.
On Fluid, deposited capital powers lending AND DEX trading simultaneously through Smart Collateral and Smart Debt.

One capital base. Multiple yield layers.
Higher utilization. Better returns.

When markets move, most protocols take 5–10% of your position.

Fluid: 0.1% minimum liquidation penalty.

Fluid only liquidates what's necessary, restoring your position to health, not wiping it out.

Fluid doesn't profit from liquidations.
They exist to protect solvency. Nothing

Borrow up to 95% LTV.

Industry standard: 70–80%.
Fluid: 95%.

Same collateral. More usable capital.

You unlock liquidity without selling your assets.

In June 2020, the Compound protocol was decentralized with the launch of COMP and the full transfer of control to the community through governance. As a foundational piece of decentralized finance infrastructure, Compound is designed to exist in perpetuity—open, autonomous, and

Attention: On 9/20/24 the Compound community’s Discord server was compromised.

Access has been regained and secured.

Always stay vigilant for scams and do not click any suspicious links.

As we noted, the issue did not impact the protocol; and no smart contracts were compromised.

We will provide further details on the investigation soon.

This is our final message // end of tweet.

✅ Update: Thanks to the tenacious efforts of so many in the community, the https://t.co/Dcq4ZkswRX website is once again secure. Please always remain vigilant in clicking links to avoid phishing scams.
